meta.title: Our first look at America's new stealthy nuclear missile!
meta.description:
We just got our first glimpse of America’s new stealthy air-launched nuclear missile, the AGM-181 Long Range Stand-Off Weapon, or LRSO. So let’s run down what we can glean from this new render, what we know about this new weapon, and what it all means for America’s deterrent nuclear posture.
